rationale: Abstract Y presents the same data with superior narrative clarity in the Results (explicit before-to-after values) and a stronger, mechanistically interpretive Conclusion that locates hydroquinidine's action at the arrhythmogenic RVOT substrate, better serving Heart Rhythm readers.
loser_weakness: Abstract X's Results section lists metrics in a dense, harder-to-parse format without a clear before-to-after narrative, and its Conclusion stops short of interpreting the regional specificity in clinical-mechanistic terms.
